title: 4 Managing Enterprise Fraud Management Users
body_text:
4	Managing Enterprise Fraud Management Users
4.1	Overview of Managing Enterprise Fraud Management Users
You can manage access to Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) on CPS Admin or User Management. See the User Management Part for procedures on granting access to EFM via User Management. This Chapter provides general information related to EFM user roles and procedures for setting up users with access to EFM on CPS Admin.
Note:
Authorized EFM users must have a 2-step security token assigned to their
Client Centre
profile to access EFM. See the User Management Part for information on assigning a 2-step security token to a user.
Related Information
Training Videos:
User Management
and
2-Step Security
4.2	EFM User Roles
Four user roles are available for Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM). The roles are categorized as Tenant Reports, Junior Investigator, Senior Investigator, and Administrator. The table below explains the actions that each role can perform. Select the applicable user role when setting up users with access to EFM in CPS Admin or User Management. You can only assign one role to each user.
Permission
Definition
Tenant Reports
Junior Investigator
Senior Investigator
Administrator
Add to AMDL List
Enables the ГўВҖВңAdd to ListГўВҖВқ option during incident review. This adds data from the current entity's event history to a data list.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Audit Log
Enables viewing of the audit log of tenant user interactions with the tenant UI.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Bulk Delete Incidents
Enables multiple incidents to be deleted without reviewing simultaneously.
ГҜВғВј
Bulk Filter Incidents
Allows filtering of incidents (in the Incident List) based on criteria that includes time, risk score, triggered rules, and models.
ГҜВғВј
Bulk Refer Incidents
Enables multiple incidents to be referred to a tenant user or team simultaneously.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Bulk Review Incidents
Enables all alerts in multiple incidents to be classified as ГўВҖВңRiskГўВҖВқ or ГўВҖВңNo-riskГўВҖВқ simultaneously.
ГҜВғВј
Data Lists
Enables the creation and management of data lists at the tenant level. This also allows the direct addition or deletion of values in data lists and import of data into data lists in CSV format.
ГҜВғВј
Documentation
Enables the inline documentation sidebar.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Event Search Box
Enables the entity search box (in the EFM header), as well as access to the ГўВҖВңEventsГўВҖВқ UI page.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Bulk Manual Alert
Allows the user to manually create alerts in bulk to non-alerted transactions from the incidents page or from event searches.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Incident Commenter
Enables incident commenting functionality.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Incident Filters
Enables the creation and editing of incident list filters based on triggered rules, tags, and/or team referred to.
ГҜВғВј
Incident Manual Alert
Enables the creation of manual alerts on an incident
ГҜВғВј
Incident Referrer
Allows the user to refer incidents to other teams or users.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Incident Referrer Viewable
Allows the user to view incidents that have been referred to other teams or users.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Incident Reviewer
Enables incident review functionality.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Incidents
Enables viewing the incident list in the solution or tenant UI, and read-only access to incident detail pages (to review incidents, a user must have the ГўВҖВңIncident ReviewerГўВҖВқ permission).
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Message Broadcast
Enables user to send messages to other users within the same tenant.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Pending Incidents
Allows the user to view the ГўВҖВңPendingГўВҖВқ list of incidents and add incidents to this list.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Teams
Enables the creation of teams and assignment of users to teams.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Unlock Incidents
Allows the unlocking of incidents being viewed by another user.
ГҜВғВј
View All Incidents
Enables selection of ГўВҖВңAll IncidentsГўВҖВқ in the Incident List filter drop-down menu. Without this permission, a user can only view the Incident List using incident filters.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
Management Information
Access management information categories in the Reports section.
ГҜВғВј
ГҜВғВј
4.3	Granting EFM Access to a Client Centre User
This section describes how a CPS Admin Security Officer assigns access to Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) on CPS Admin. See the User Management Part for procedures on granting access to EFM in the User Management application. You must have administrative rights to assign EFM access to others. See Section 4.4, Granting EFM Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer, for procedures on obtaining administrative rights.
Note:	EFM users require a 2-step security token (hard token or soft token) to access the Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) solution. See the User Management Part for procedures on assigning a new token or updating an existing token.
To grant EFM access to a new or existing Client Centre User on CPS Admin:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CPS Admin
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing CPS Admin
Enter the code generated on your registered 2-step security token, then select
Done
. See FigureВ 4.
Figure 4: Entering 2-Step Security Code
Select
Click Here
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: CPS Administration Access
Select
Edit User
if youГўВҖВҷre editing an existing Client Centre User.
Alternatively, select
Add User
if the individual is not yet set up as a Client Centre User. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on creating Client Centre Users.
Scroll down to the Applications Menu once the userГўВҖВҷs profile is displayed, then select the check box beside Fraud-Alert Services. Enter Yes or the letter ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ in the text box beside the applicable user role. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Assigning Access to EFM
Select
Submit
at the bottom of the page.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer authorize the task.
Ensure that the new user has a 2-step security token assigned to their profile. See the User Management Part for procedures.
4.4	Granting EFM Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer
Two ways are available to manage your CPS Admin Security Officers, depending on the change required. You can either send a written request to Central 1 to make a change on your behalf, or you can make the change directly in the User Management application.
If a CPS Admin Security Officer requires personal and administrative access to EFM, or administrative access only, complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, as described below. Administrative access allows the CPS Admin Security Officer to assign the application to other users.
If a CPS Admin Security Officer only requires personal access to EFM, another CPS Admin Security Officer can make this change on the User Management application. CPS Admin Security Officers can assign another CPS Admin Security OfficerГўВҖВҷs personal access to EFM, but they canГўВҖВҷt assign administrative rights. See the User Management Part for more information.
To grant EFM access to an existing CPS Admin Security Officer through Central 1:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035. See Figure 7. Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Action
ГўВҖВ“ Select
Add
.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Personal Access Rights
ГўВҖВ“ Record ГўВҖВңEFM: Fraud Alert ServicesГўВҖВқ to give the individual personal access to EFM.
ГўВ‘Вў
Administrative Rights
ГўВҖВ“ Record ГўВҖВңEFM: Fraud Alert ServicesГўВҖВқ if the individual is authorized to assign EFM access to Client Centre Users and personal access to other CPS Admin Security Officers.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Financial Institution Authorization
ГўВҖВ“ Ensure that two authorized signing officers sign the form.
Figure 7: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, your central will authorize the form and forward it to Central 1.
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer update the modified Security OfficerГўВҖВҷs 2-step security token with access to EFM if the request is for personal access. See the User Management Part for procedures.
Related Information
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
4.5	Granting EFM Access to a New CPS Admin Security Officer
CPS Admin Security Officers canГўВҖВҷt create other CPS Admin Security Officers. These requests must be sent to Central 1. To grant EFM access to a new CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918. See Figure 8. Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Personal Access Rights
ГўВҖВ“ Record ГўВҖВңEFM: Fraud Alert ServicesГўВҖВқ to give the individual personal access to EFM.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Administrative Rights
ГўВҖВ“ Record ГўВҖВңEFM: Fraud Alert ServicesГўВҖВқ if the individual is authorized to assign EFM access to Client Centre Users and personal access to other CPS Admin Security Officers.
ГўВ‘Вў
Financial Institution Authorization
ГўВҖВ“ Ensure that two authorized signing officers sign the form.
Figure 8: CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, your central will authorize the form and forward it to Central 1.
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Central 1 will communicate a unique, one-time password to the new CPS Admin Security Officer.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer assign a 2-step security token to the new CPS Admin Security Officer. See the User Management Part for procedures.
Related Information
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate,
Form 1918
END
